name: ReproForge
shortDescription: Turn authorized bug reports into machine-verified, portable reproductions.
longDescription: ReproForge turns incomplete bug reports into portable reproductions backed by machine evidence. Run a fixed synthetic demonstration without linking an account, or connect an authorized GitHub repository through OAuth and select an immutable commit. ReproForge tests a negative control and repeated candidate runs in an isolated, deny-all environment, then shows the proof and exports a content-addressed bundle only when the evidence supports VERIFIED. No OpenAI API key is required from the user.

logo.alt: ReproForge geometric R mark with a proof spark and green forged leg on a dark square.
logo.rights: Original geometric artwork created for ReproForge in this repository; no third-party logo or icon is embedded.

starterPrompts: Run the trusted ReproForge demonstration and export its bundle after showing me the machine evidence.
List the GitHub repositories I authorized for ReproForge and explain which one is safe to use as a synthetic canary.
Reproduce the planted failure in my selected canary at its pinned commit and show the negative control and repeat runs.
Refresh the proof for my latest ReproForge case and export its bundle only if the measured outcome supports verification.

screenshots.alt: Desktop ReproForge proof widget showing VERIFIED, 100 percent repeatability, three of three candidate matches, a clear negative control, evidence lanes, hypotheses, clean-room runs, and bundle export.
screenshots.caption: The real production MCP App resource rendered at desktop width with the complete machine-evidence hierarchy.
screenshots.provenance: First-party capture of the public production widget-preview route using the bundled synthetic cli-spaces fixture; not a ChatGPT-host screenshot.

screenshots.alt: Mobile ReproForge proof widget showing the same verified evidence, clear control, hypotheses, four clean-room runs, bundle files, refresh, and export controls without horizontal overflow.
screenshots.caption: The real production MCP App resource at a 390-pixel mobile width with all proof and export controls intact.
screenshots.provenance: First-party capture of the public production widget-preview route using the bundled synthetic cli-spaces fixture; not a ChatGPT-host screenshot.

releaseNotes: Initial ReproForge submission draft: the keyless synthetic demonstration is connected and verified inside ChatGPT with no ReproForge account or user API key, while the OAuth-linked immutable GitHub canary completes through the production web path with repeated candidate runs, a negative control, and content-addressed bundle export. Protected ChatGPT review cases, reviewer identity, supported countries, publisher verification, and portal submission remain pending; this draft has not been submitted.
